scripts.dev: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvm use >/dev/null; bunx alchemy dev alchemy.run.ts 2>&1 | bun run scripts/split-logs.ts'
scripts.deploy: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvm use >/dev/null; bun run alchemy.run.ts 2>&1 | bun run scripts/split-logs.ts'
scripts.destroy: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvm use >/dev/null; DESTROY=true bun run alchemy.run.ts 2>&1 | bun run scripts/split-logs.ts'
